Title: Spartacus: House of Ashur
Actors: Nick E. Tarabay, Graham McTavish, Tenika Davis
Plot: In a world where he survived the events of Spartacus (2010), Ashur clawed his way to power, owning the same ludus that once owned him. Allying with a fierce gladiatrix, Ashur ignites a new kind of spectacle that offends the elite.
